help.howPlayExplanation: Guess the exact addition or subtraction in five tries. The form of the equation is
help.equationExample: a + b = c or a - b = c, where c is positive
help.green: The sign + is at the correct position.
help.yellow: The digit 6 is in the solution, but at the wrong spot.
help.gray: The digit 5 does not appear in the equation.
help.colorBlindModeDescription: Color Blind Mode changes the standard feedback colors: correct-position green becomes amber, present-elsewhere yellow becomes blue, and absent gray stays gray.
help.aboutDescription: Hi, I am AllenZlink. If you have any questions visit allen-zlink.com or contact me via Twitter.
help.aboutDescription2: This project is heavily inspired by Wordle, Primel and mathle.com.
success.message: Good job! Try another mode or come back for the next puzzle.
success.show: Share your success with the world:
next.infinite: Start a new infinite puzzle anytime.
key.operatorAlreadyUsed: This guess already has an operator.
failure.message: That was a tough one. Try another mode or come back for the next puzzle.
failure.share: Share your result with the world anyways!
settings.colorblind.desc: The default colors are not color blind friendly. Change them here.
settings.darkMode.desc: Use a darker color theme for night play.
